name: asks first-time reporter for blocking version details
description: A specific external bug report is missing one blocking environment detail. The outcome should ask one concise question instead of rewriting or restating the report.

issue.title: get_sentry_issue fails for self-hosted Sentry
issue.author: first-report
issue.body: Calling `get_sentry_issue` for organization `acme` and issue `123` returns `request failed` against our self-hosted Sentry instance. The same request works against sentry.io. I can reproduce this consistently, but I have not included the self-hosted Sentry version or the underlying HTTP status and response body.

pass: Asks for the self-hosted Sentry version and the underlying HTTP status or response body because those details distinguish compatibility from authentication or routing failures.
Uses one concise request and does not restate the full report.
fail: Claims the failure was reproduced or inspected in the repository.
Presents a root cause before the missing response details are available.
Uses a generic handoff such as asking the reporter to wait for maintainer review.
